params.name: culture
params.description: Locale for both the query semantics and the response content (`nl` Dutch, `en` English).

params.name: key
params.description: The caller's Rijksstudio API key.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. `json` is the default; `jsonp` requires a `callback` parameter; `xml` is also offered.

params.name: p
params.description: Result page number (0-based). `p * ps` cannot exceed 10,000.

params.name: ps
params.description: Number of results per page.

params.name: q
params.description: Free-text search terms applied across object fields.

params.name: involvedMaker
params.description: Restrict to objects produced by this maker (e.g. `Rembrandt van Rijn`).

params.name: type
params.description: Object type (e.g. `schilderij`, `prent`).

params.name: material
params.description: Material used to make the object (e.g. `doek`, `papier`).

params.name: technique
params.description: Technique used to produce the object (e.g. `olieverf`, `ets`).

params.name: f.dating.period
params.description: Century in which the object was made (0–21).

params.name: f.normalized32Colors.hex
params.description:
Filter on the dominant colour palette (32-colour normalised). The
literal `#` must be URL-encoded as `%23`.

params.name: imgonly
params.description: Only return objects that have an image.

params.name: toppieces
params.description: Only return objects flagged as top pieces.

params.name: s
params.description: Sort order applied to the result set.

items.docs:
Returns a paginated list of objects in the Rijksmuseum collection. All
filter parameters mirror the museum's advanced search experience.
Pagination is capped so that `p * ps` cannot exceed 10,000 results — use
the [OAI-PMH harvesting API](https://data.rijksmuseum.nl/object-metadata/harvest/)
for full-corpus access.

params.name: culture
params.description: Locale for both the query semantics and the response content (`nl` Dutch, `en` English).

params.name: key
params.description: The caller's Rijksstudio API key.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format. `json` is the default; `jsonp` requires a `callback` parameter; `xml` is also offered.

params.name: objectNumber
params.description: Case-sensitive object identifier (e.g. `SK-C-5`).

items.docs:
Returns the full record for a single object identified by its
case-sensitive `objectNumber` (e.g. `SK-C-5` for *The Night Watch*).
Object numbers are obtained from the search response.

params.name: culture
params.description: Locale for both the query semantics and the response content (`nl` Dutch, `en` English).

params.name: key
params.description: The caller's Rijksstudio API key.

params.name: objectNumber
params.description: Case-sensitive object identifier (e.g. `SK-C-5`).

items.docs:
Returns the tile-pyramid description for an object's web image. The
response contains one entry per zoom level (`z0`–`z6`, where `z0` is
the largest resolution and `z6` is the smallest), and each level
carries a list of image tiles with x/y coordinates and a CDN URL.

This endpoint only supports the JSON response format.
